title: Fast Local Feedback, Hooks, and Developer Experience · Failure Case: Agent Guidance
summary: Create fast local gates that match CI without blocking ordinary iteration. Planned artifact: Add and verify the gates agent guidance increment in a one-command local verification workflow. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Document exact gate commands and completion expectations in AGENTS.md or equivalent.
Treat local hooks as convenience while CI remains authoritative and bypasses stay visible.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
